title: ask Write(*) + acceptEdits mode -> explicit ask survives acceptEdits, Write stays ask

probes.prompt: Use the Write tool to create a file at $CASE_DIR/PROOF.txt with the content 'ok'. Do it immediately. Do not ask, do not explain — just make the tool call.

hypothesis: 明示 ask 規則はどのモードでも残る（spec §1）。acceptEdits はファイル編集を自動承認するが、ask 規則がそれを上書きしてプロンプト強制するはず。acceptEdits の自動承認 vs ask 規則の優先の対照。
notes: MEASURED 2026-07-05: headless=DENIED, SDK=ASK (askFired=Write) under acceptEdits -> explicit ask overrides acceptEdits auto-approve. spec §1.
